topic.title: Uber Quetion ANyone Solve please fast

post.content:
vector<int> solution(vector<int> ks, vector<int> ls, vector<int> ns) {

}


Given 3 positive integers K,L,N where K \leq L \leq NK≤L≤N
A integer set T of size L is called good if all integers in T are distinct and lie in range [1,N][1,N].
Let S be the set of all such possible sets T of given length LL.

Let A be the uniformly and randomly chosen set from S. J_AJ
​A
​​  be the K^{th}K
​th
​​  smallest integer in this set A. Find sum of J_AJ
​A
​​  modulo 998244353998244353 over all such good sets AA.

Since the problem is too easy for you, you will have to solve this for QQ such query.
Input is given in form of 3 arrays Ks,Ls,NsKs,Ls,Ns each of size QQ.
i^{th}i
​th
​​  query consists of K = ks[i], L = ls[i], N = ns[i]K=ks[i],L=ls[i],N=ns[i]

Constraints:

1 <= Q <= 10^310
​3
​​ 
1 <= K <= L <= N <= 10^610
​6
​​ 
Sample Input

ks: [2, 1, 2, 3]
ls: [2, 1, 2, 3]
ns: [3, 1, 2, 3]
Sample Output

[8, 1, 2, 3]
Here, one has to solve for 4 different queries -

K=L=2,N=3K=L=2,N=3
K=L=N=1K=L=N=1
K=L=N=2K=L=N=2
K=L=N=3K=L=N=3
Lets look at K=L=2,N=3K=L=2,N=3 case -
TT has 3 possible sets (1,2)(1,2) , (1,3)(1,3) and (2,3)(2,3).
2nd smallest value in all of these sets resp. is 2,3,32,3,3, sum of these is 88.

[execution time limit] 1 seconds (cpp)

[input] array.integer ks

[input] array.integer ls

[input] array.integer ns

[output] array.integer
